violations.text: Baby formula was observed held past its disposition date indicated on the packaging. Food items were pulled off the shelve and will be scanned out of system and placed for return to purveyor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
Restrooms that staff use are lacking the proper handwashing signage. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

Baby formula was observed on retail shelves for sale exceeding use by dates. Baby formula was removed from retail sale during time of inspection. Products were placed aside to be scanned out and to be returned to purveyor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
